title: citrus × nobilis subf. haili
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. haili, commonly known as Meyer lemon, is a citrus plant that is a cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus sinensis). It is known for its unique flavor and medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis subf. haili include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant properties. Citrus × nobilis subf. haili can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or added to foods and beverages to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
